sql-case.value: SELECT user_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER w AS 'row_number', RANK() OVER w AS 'rank', DENSE_RANK() OVER w AS 'dense_rank' FROM t_order WHERE order_id = ? WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY user_id)
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k ORDER BY v) FROM t_order
SELECT LEAD(v) OVER (PARTITION BY k ORDER BY v) FROM t_order
SELECT FIRST_VALUE(v) OVER (PARTITION BY k ORDER BY v) FROM t_order
SELECT LAST_VALUE(v) OVER (PARTITION BY k ORDER BY v ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) FROM t_order
SELECT SUM(v) OVER (PARTITION BY k ORDER BY v ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) FROM t_order
SELECT SUM(v) OVER (PARTITION BY k ORDER BY v ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) FROM t_order
SELECT NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY id) FROM t_order
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_id) AS rn FROM t_order
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_id) AS rn FROM t_order
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LENGTH(email) ORDER BY user_id) AS rn FROM t_order
SELECT order_id, user_id, LEAD(order_id, ?, ?) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_id) AS next_order_default FROM t_order WHERE user_id BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY user_id, order_id
SELECT user_id, user_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER w AS rn FROM t_user WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY LENGTH(user_name), user_id)
SELECT SUM(order_id) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_sum FROM t_order
SELECT COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id) AS partition_count FROM t_order
SELECT AVG(order_id) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id) AS avg_order_id FROM t_order
SELECT MIN(order_id) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id) AS min_order_id FROM t_order
SELECT MAX(order_id) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id) AS max_order_id FROM t_order
